sql.where:
and u.username like CONCAT('%',#{username},'%')
and nc.content like CONCAT('%',#{content},'%')
and nc.is_deleted = 0 and n.is_deleted = 0

mapper.select:
select from notice_comment nc left join user u on u.id = nc.user_id left join notice n on n.id = nc.notice_id
order by nc.id desc
mapper.insert: insert into notice_comment ( id, notice_id, user_id, content, esteem, status ) values ( #{id}, #{noticeId}, #{userId}, #{content}, #{esteem}, #{status} )
mapper.update:
update notice_comment set
content = #{content},
esteem = #{esteem},
update_time = now() where id = #{id}
update notice_comment set is_deleted = 1 where id = #{id}
update notice_comment set is_deleted = 1 where notice_id = #{noticeId}
mapper.select: select nc.id,u.username,u.avatar,nc.content,nc.esteem,nc.create_time from notice_comment nc left join user u on u.id = nc.user_id left join notice n on n.id = nc.notice_id where nc.notice_id = #{noticeId} and nc.status = 1 and nc.is_deleted = 0 order by nc.id desc
